#164 1st day at the Shanghai airport

Areas discussed: South Korea, Busan, Gimhae International Airport, Shanghai Pudong International Airport

December 3, 2025 1 hour 37 minutes China

All transcripts are machine generated.

maybe I'll just try talking into my phone that doesn't seem so bad then it's like I'm talking into a phone but anyway I'll walk by some Chinese food little Chinese food restaurant area and it's the first nice association I've had so far in China I'm like ah Chinese food that smells good other than that this place this place fucking blows man it's extremely similar to Russia for now though yeah man this place is fucking ridiculous this is weird I've got a headphones in so I can hear myself talk but now I'm hearing an echo so I'm gonna turn them off but that sounded fine I guess the question is how weird is this now I'm just talking into a phone but who the fuck knows man this is the land of security what the shit I just had to go through another security thing just to get from terminal 1 to terminal 2 however terminal 2 I believe is my home to hell the morning but this is a good example of 40:00 I think my little theory about just the security of knowing what's coming this is fucking sucky but I just seems like whatever whatever it's not like it's news the China's a fucked up country and even if it was I already got the news from when I was in Russia stuck there overnight there was this Dutch guy named Valentine that I hung out with all night and he told me like three different times that if I thought the bureaucracy was bad in Russia he said in China it's much worse like he couldn't be more emphatic about how much worse things are in China and that's where I am so whatever man but all I got to do is hang out here if I can find somewhere to curl up that would be nice but worst case scenario I can go to the ticket counter for my flight in a little over 12 hours so I don't know if I stay up for 12 hours walk in the airport it's not optimal but I'm not stressed out about it like I was yesterday it was so funny because yesterday when you really boil it down I went from one hotel to another I went from the hotel in Seguapo to a hotel in Busan like on a surface level it was a fucking cool last day wasn't a hard day at all just that everywhere in the middle I didn't know what the fuck was going on it made me miserable here at least I know what's going on I just have a long waiting game to play no internet because of course why wouldn't it the millions of hoops to get on the fucking internet I couldn't get on the internet in Russia either just know this place sucks but just here to do a transfer man I really doubt I have a feeling that my flight was kind of in trouble from the beginning even before the typhoon sent me scrambling because I did only have 90 minutes to transfer in this airport and I was a little unsure about that already but now that I've been here I don't fancy my fucking chances dude I had to do multiple rounds of fingerprint scans just to hang out in the airport 90 minutes is not enough to transfer in Shanghai for now I guess I'll just find where my it's find where my flight company is so I know where to go at 8.30 in the morning and then as for what I'm gonna do all night I don't fucking know
